evals.prompt: Run hostveil with --serve, use agent-browser to open the browser terminal, drive the TUI through overview/findings/history/help/settings, capture screenshots, and tell me if anything looks broken.
evals.expected_output: Starts hostveil --serve, parses the actual fallback URL, captures a diverse screenshot set, reads the images, and reports visual findings rather than only listing files.

evals.prompt: Can you visually QA the hostveil TUI in browser mode? Please include a narrow viewport responsive screenshot and check whether the theme switch applies.
evals.expected_output: Uses --serve plus agent-browser, captures normal and narrow viewport screenshots, changes theme through Settings, confirms keyboard input worked, and notes any scrollbars or layout issues.

evals.prompt: Use the vaultwarden compose fixture and collect browser screenshots of the hostveil findings list, detail panel, filters, help modal, and settings modal.
evals.expected_output: Runs against tests/scenarios/vaultwarden-domain/docker-compose.yml, focuses the ttyd terminal input, navigates with documented keys, saves named screenshots, inspects them, and cleans up background processes.
